name: Bread Provencale
recipeIngredient: 425 grams Italian tomatoes, peeled, drained, and chopped coarsely
2/3 cup Green olives, pitted and finely chopped
2/3 cup Black olives, pitted and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage mince in olive oil until well cooked, then set aside.
2. Cut ends off bread sticks and hollow out the center using a long thin knife.
3. Place the ends of the bread sticks and the drained bread from the center into a food processor and process until you have breadcrumbs.
4. Mix the breadcrumbs with tomatoes, sliced spring onions, chopped green and black olives, capers, fresh basil, dried thyme, crushed garlic, black pepper, and remaining sausage mince in a bowl.
5. Stuff the hollowed-out bread sticks with the mixture.
6. Wrap tightly in foil and chill for 8 hours.
7. Slice into 5 cm pieces to serve.
